pages.name: Presales Checklist
pages.intro: Checklist items with corrected professional wording.

checklists.title: Presales Engagement Model on Deals and Presales Activities Tracking and Time Log
checklists.description: Presales engagement on deals covers active and reactive modes, and Presales activities must be tracked through time logging.
solution_bullets: Create a settings page in Zoho CRM as a custom widget.
Presales users will not have the option to edit records directly; updates will be made only through Blueprint.
A time value will be added when each Blueprint action is clicked, and this time will be determined on the settings page.

checklists.title: Presales Activities Tracking and Time Log, Presales Technical Proposal Preparation, Task List, and Estimated Efforts
checklists.description: Project sizes versus project management require a checklist for each case. Professional services pricing should include fixed and flexible options.
solution_bullets: Create a dynamic settings page for each department.
The page will be managed by the roles of Project Manager and Presales Manager.
The settings will be defined according to the market need and the company need during that period.
The page will include project budget limits.
All services will be displayed on the page.
The team will be able to reduce the profit margin or define that the company wants more projects.
The page should be as dynamic as possible so they can define their priorities for the coming period.
This review will take place in a monthly meeting.
If the settings are not updated, an escalation will be raised.

pages.name: Enhance CRM
pages.intro: CRM enhancement items for reporting, visibility, and resource planning.

checklists.title: Rotation Module for Deals and Leads
checklists.description: A rotation module will be built to identify who is working on each deal or lead for reporting purposes.
solution_bullets: Build a rotation module.
The module will show who is working on each deal or lead.
The module will be used for reporting.

checklists.title: Department Dashboard Widget
checklists.description: A dashboard widget will be built for each department, and it will show the technical resource capacity for the team.
solution_bullets: Build a dashboard widget for each department.
Only the Super Admin can view all departments.
The widget will explain how many projects each team member is handling.
The widget will show the total available hours for each technical resource.
The widget is focused on technical resources, not only on projects.
The data will be taken from Zoho People and Zoho Projects.
Each manager will be able to see the available technical resources and determine the project need.
